revision.comment: replace {{{1|{{CURRENTDAY}}}}} by 1 to ensure that -1 month gives a valid day in the previous month; fixes bug where for example {{Lmonth|31|March}} produced Mar instead of Feb

Reverted to revision 672505228 by [[Special:Contributions/PrimeHunter|PrimeHunter]]: Changes broke usage in [[Template:HD Archive header]] and five other templates using substitution to make navigation headers in archive pages. ([[WP:TW|TW]])

{{documentation|content= '''Month:'''
{{tl|Lmonth}} produces {{Lmonth}}
{{tl|Nmonth}} produces {{Nmonth}}
{{tl|LastMonth}} produces {{LastMonth}}
{{tl|NextMonth}} produces {{NextMonth}} == See also == *{{tl|Calendar}} *{{tl|Calendar clock with Wikipedia stats}} *{{tl|Clock}} *{{tl|Digital clock}} *{{tl|Digital clock and date}} }}
HouseBlaster moved page [[Template:Lmonth]] to [[Template:Last month (short)]]: expand template name per [[WP:TPN]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
